name: Piperade Frittata
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together eggs, water, cheese, salt and basil.
2. Stir in piperade.
3. Heat oil in a 10- to 12-inch nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add ham; saute for 2 minutes until browned on the bottom.
5. Reduce heat to medium.
6. With a spatula, lift the edges of the frittata so uncooked egg runs underneath.
7. Cook until set, about 1 to 2 minutes.
8. Continue lifting and cooking until the egg is completely set and lightly browned on the underside.
9. Flip the frittata and brown the top side for about 2 minutes.
10. Transfer the frittata to a platter; dust with pepper.
11. Cut into 4 wedges. Top with tomato sauce if desired.
